description_long: This object is a chunk of bread with an irregular, faceted shape and a rich, golden-brown crust. The surface displays a marbled pattern of lighter and darker brown hues, suggesting a well-baked exterior with some glossy highlights. One side reveals a rougher, porous interior, indicating a soft, airy crumb typical of rustic or artisan bread. The crust appears thick and slightly shiny, with some unevenness and natural cracks. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or decorative scoring on the crust. The overall appearance suggests a hearty, hand-cut piece of bread, possibly from a larger loaf.
description: A hand-cut, irregular chunk of golden-brown bread with a thick, marbled crust and a rough, airy interior exposed on one side.
description_view_0: This view highlights the broad, marbled crust with glossy highlights and subtle cracks, showing the bread's angular, faceted shape.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the sloped, smooth crust with lighter and darker brown tones, and less of the interior is visible.
description_view_2: This angle reveals the rough, porous interior crumb, contrasting with the thick, golden-brown crust on the upper surface.
description_view_3: The view exposes both the crust and a large section of the bread's interior, showing the transition from the hard exterior to the soft, airy inside.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust has a natural, marbled pattern with glossy highlights and subtle cracks, lacking any decorative scoring, flour dusting, or seeds.
